scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
scripts.postinstall: npm run db:deploy -w backend && npm run db:seed -w backend
scripts.e2e:backend: cd backend && rm -f prisma/e2e.db prisma/e2e.db-journal && DATABASE_URL=file:./e2e.db PORT=3105 OPENROUTER_API_KEY= OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-e2e-test OPENAI_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3106/v1 sh -c 'npx prisma migrate deploy && npx tsx prisma/seed.ts && npx tsx src/index.ts'
